latex:
You keep track of the daily high temperatures (in degrees Fahrenheit) for one week. Your results are:

$72, 68, 75, 70, 66$

Part A Find and interpret the number of data values.

There are \underline{\hspace{1cm}} data values. So, you recorded temperatures for \underline{\hspace{1cm}} days.

Part B What are the units?

a. $\bigcirc$ miles

b. $\bigcirc$ degrees Fahrenheit

c. $\bigcirc$ pounds

d. $\bigcirc$ gallons
answer_latex: Part A: 5; 5 \quad Part B: b. degrees Fahrenheit
